headline: Dominion Energy (D) Hits Fresh Record High on NextEra Merger
summary: Dominion Energy Inc. (NYSE:D) is one of the 10 Stocks Making Monster Moves. Dominion Energy soared to a new three-year high on Monday, as investors gobbled up shares following news that it is merging with NextEra Energy, potentially creating the largest regulated power distribution utility company globally. headline: US utilities NextEra and Dominion agree to $66.8bn all-share merger

content.summary: Following the merger, the combined entity will operate under the NextEra Energy name and will be listed on the NYSE under the ticker 'NEE'.
